label: Thing set maker
description: Defines a procedural generator tree that produces a set of Thing objects for rewards, loot, trader stock, and other game systems. The root field selects the top-level maker class; debugParams lets designers test generation without running a scenario.

root.label: Root
root.description: Top-level thing set maker that drives generation. The Class attribute selects the concrete ThingSetMaker subclass.

debugParams.label: Debug params
debugParams.description: Optional generation parameters used by in-editor debug generation tools. Does not affect runtime generation.
